# Social Media Manager — AI-Optimized Platform Guide

> Last updated: July 2026 | Version: 1.0.0

## What This Platform Does

AI-powered social media scheduling platform. Schedule posts to LinkedIn, X/Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, and YouTube from one dashboard. Generate content with AI, A/B test variations, track analytics, and manage your entire social presence.

## Core Features

### Publishing
- **Multi-platform scheduling** — One post → 5 platforms with per-platform caption, media, and timing customization
- **5 real platform publishers** — LinkedIn (REST API v2), X/Twitter (API v2), Facebook (Graph API v19), Instagram (Content Publishing API), YouTube (Data API v3 with native `publishAt`)
- **Recurring series** — Automated weekly threads, daily tips, monthly newsletters
- **Content dependencies** — Schedule post A before post B with dependency chains

### AI-Powered Content
- **AI caption generator** — Platform-specific captions with tone, hashtags, and CTAs
- **AI content adaptation** — Rewrite content per platform using LLM (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, OpenRouter)
- **AI calendar generator** — Auto-generate full month content plans
- **Content repurposing** — Transform blog → thread → carousel → reel → shorts → story (7 routes)
- **Multi-language translator** — Translate captions to 20 languages
- **Hashtag strategist** — AI-powered hashtag research per platform
- **Content scoring** — Predict engagement 0-100 before publishing

### Intelligence
- **Data-driven best times** — Analytics-based scheduling recommendations (not static)
- **Content recycling** — Auto-reshare top performers weekly
- **Analytics feedback loop** — 6 types of improvement suggestions from your data
- **Cross-posting templates** — Auto-adapt content for each platform format
- **Content forecasting** — Predict engagement for proposed posts
- **Cohort analysis** — Compare performance by platform, time, content type

### Operations
- **Approval workflow** — Request → approve/reject → publish with multi-stage chains
- **A/B testing** — Create variants, stagger publish, auto-select winner by metrics
- **Bulk operations** — Schedule, cancel, caption update, reschedule in batch
- **Dead-letter queue** — Failed publishes with error categorization and retry
- **Content versioning** — Snapshot + rollback to any previous version
- **Content dependencies** — Post A before post B with cycle detection

### Monitoring
- **Platform health** — Real-time API status, token validity, latency
- **Rate limit tracking** — Per-platform quotas and throttling
- **Error dashboard** — Failure analytics, platform breakdown, bulk retry
- **Audit log** — 17 action types tracking who did what when
- **Calendar reminders** — Upcoming posts, overdue detection

### Integration
- **Webhook receivers** — Facebook, Instagram, YouTube callbacks
- **RSS ingestion** — Auto-create posts from feeds
- **SSE real-time updates** — Live queue status streaming
- **CSV/JSON export** — Scheduling and analytics reports
- **Content templates** — 5 built-in + custom save/reuse
- **UTM builder** — Auto-tag links per platform for analytics
- **Link shortener** — Bitly/TinyURL integration

### Quality
- **10-dimension quality rubric** — Clarity, engagement, CTA, compliance scoring
- **Compliance checker** — Platform ToS validation, banned patterns, disclosure requirements
- **Smart scheduling rules** — 6 configurable rules (optimal time, conflicts, hours, balance)
- **Brand voice checker** — Consistency scoring against voice guidelines
- **Content gap analyzer** — Identify missing topics via LLM analysis
- **Social listening** — Brand mention monitoring, sentiment analysis
- **Competitor tracking** — Posting pattern analysis

### Enterprise
- **API key management** — Generate, rotate, revoke with 10 permission scopes
- **Bulk import/export** — CSV import with validation
- **Report generator** — HTML/JSON analytics reports with insights
- **Automation rules** — If-then scheduling automation (5 built-in rules)
- **Team workload balancer** — Distribute posts across team members
- **Postmortem** — Auto-analyze failed publishes with root cause

## API Overview

- **Base URL:** `https://your-domain.com/api`
- **Auth:** Bearer JWT token from `/api/auth/login`
- **Docs:** `https://your-domain.com/api/docs` (Swagger UI)
- **152 endpoints** across scheduling, analytics, publishing, and management

## Platform Support

| Platform | Publishing | Scheduling | Analytics | Best Times | Hashtags |
|----------|-----------|-----------|-----------|------------|----------|
| LinkedIn | ✅ Real API | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ Data-driven | ✅ AI |
| X/Twitter | ✅ Real API | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ Data-driven | ✅ AI |
| Facebook | ✅ Real API | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ Data-driven | ✅ AI |
| Instagram | ✅ Real API | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ Data-driven | ✅ AI |
| YouTube | ✅ Native scheduling | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ Data-driven | ✅ AI |

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Frontend | Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS |
| Backend | FastAPI (Python 3.12), SQLAlchemy async |
| Database | PostgreSQL 16 |
| Queue | Redis 7, Celery 5.4 |
| AI | OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, OpenRouter, DeepSeek |
| Storage | AWS S3 |
| Auth | OAuth 2.0, JWT |

## Quick Start

1. Register at `/auth/register`
2. Connect platforms via OAuth at `/connections`
3. Create content in Content Studio
4. Schedule via Calendar or Queue
5. Track performance in Analytics

## Links

- **Repository:** https://github.com/ranaprv/social-media-app
- **API Docs:** `/api/docs`
- **Architecture:** `/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`
- **Full Documentation:** See `llms-full.txt`
